crawled_name:
Last updated: Wed Apr 29 2026

OVERVIEW

The San Francisco Police Department
acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by San Francisco CA PD and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), personal use.
access_policy:
All system access requires a valid reason.
USAGE
overview:
Last updated: Wed Apr 29 2026

OVERVIEW

The San Francisco Police Department uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising on individual privacy. The San Francisco Police Department utilizes retroactive search to solve crimes after they've occurred. In an effort to ensure proper usage and guardrails are in place, they have made the below policies and usage statistics available to the public.

POLICIES
